headline: A Look At Atmos Energy (ATO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why Atmos Energy (ATO) is on investors’ radar today Atmos Energy (ATO) has been drawing attention as investors reassess regulated utilities, and its stock has recently given back some gains, with the price closing at US$169.13. For context, the company reports annual revenue of US$4.88b and net income of US$1.35b from its natural gas distribution and pipeline and storage operations across eight U.S. states.
